auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.unauthorized: You do not have permission to access this page.

billing.title: Subscription
billing.subtitle: Choose your plan and complete payment to get started immediately.
billing.featureBuildingsDesc: Organise all your units and properties
billing.featureTeamDesc: Supervisor, Finance, Maintenance — everyone sees what they need
billing.featureSecureDesc: Your payment data is encrypted and fully isolated
billing.trustedBy: Trusted by property managers across MENA
billing.finalizingSub: Please stay on this page. This usually takes just a moment.
billing.errorSub: We couldn't confirm your payment. Please try again or contact support.

landing.heroSubtext: The all-in-one platform for MENA property owners. Manage teams, tenants, and payments — all in one place.
landing.feature1Desc: Each organization is fully data-isolated. Your data never crosses workspace boundaries.
landing.feature2Desc: Five roles from admin to tenant. Every person sees exactly what they need.
landing.feature3Desc: Tenants log in and view their lease and payment history. Launching in stage 2.
landing.feature4Desc: Stripe-powered subscription billing and payment tracking built in.

dashboard.propertyToolsDesc: Manage properties, units, maintenance requests, and work orders — launching in stage 2.
dashboard.tenantEmpty: Your lease & payments will appear here soon
dashboard.tenantEmptyDesc: Once your landlord sets up your unit and lease, you'll see your balance, due dates, and payment history here.
dashboard.activeSub: Your workspace is active and fully operational.
dashboard.inactiveSub: Your subscription is not active. Activate to access all features.
